mapper.select: /* selectBillCompanyInfo */ SELECT bill_company_id, company_nm AS bill_company_nm, representative_nm AS bill_representative_nm , biz_no AS bill_biz_no , address AS bill_address , biz_type AS bill_biz_type, biz_item AS bill_biz_item, tel_no AS billTelNo, fax_no AS billFaxNo , CONCAT(bank_nm, ' ' ,depositor_nm, ' ', account_no) AS bill_account_info , reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM bill_company WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId} order by bill_company_id desc
/* selectBillCompanyCodeList */ SELECT bill_company_id as codeVal, company_nm as codeNm, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM bill_company WHERE del_yn = 'N' order by bill_company_id desc

/* "selectBillCompanyCodeDetailList" */ SELECT bill_company_id as codeVal, company_nm as codeNm, reg_id, reg_dt, chg_id, chg_dt, del_yn FROM bill_company WHERE del_yn = 'N' order by bill_company_id desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bill_company ( COMPANY_NM, REPRESENTATIVE_NM, BIZ_NO, ADDRESS, POST_NO, BIZ_TYPE, BIZ_ITEM, TEL_NO, FAX_NO, EMAIL, BANK_NM, DEPOSITOR_NM, ACCOUNT_NO, RMK, REG_ID, REG_DT, CHG_ID, CHG_DT, DEL_YN ) VALUES ( #{companyNm}, #{representativeNm}, #{bizNo}, #{address}, #{postNo}, #{bizType}, #{bizItem}, #{telNo}, #{faxNo}, #{email}, #{bankNm}, #{depositorNm}, #{accountNo}, #{rmk}, #{regId}, NOW(), #{chgId}, NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.update: UPDATE bill_company SET COMPANY_NM = #{companyNm}, REPRESENTATIVE_NM = #{representativeNm}, BIZ_NO = #{bizNo}, ADDRESS = #{address}, POST_NO = #{postNo}, BIZ_TYPE = #{bizType}, BIZ_ITEM = #{bizItem}, TEL_NO = #{telNo}, FAX_NO = #{faxNo}, EMAIL = #{email}, BANK_NM = #{bankNm}, DEPOSITOR_NM = #{depositorNm}, ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo}, RMK = #{rmk}, CHG_ID = #{chgId}, CHG_DT = NOW() WHERE BILL_COMPANY_ID = #{billCompanyId}
UPDATE bill_company SET del_yn = 'Y', chg_id = #{chgId}, chg_dt = now() WHERE bill_company_id = #{billCompanyId}
